title: The next era of AI coding
summary: Michael Truell, Cursor's CEO, argues that software engineering is shifting from manual coding to managing teams of autonomous agents. He reports that 30% of Cursor's pull requests are fully agent-developed, enterprise AI-generated code rose from 15% to 75% in a year, and agents successfully built a browser in one week without human intervention.
